title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
We at Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Bhubaneswar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medanta Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
